title: PostRow and other types missing Debug derive
description: In smallhold, several types lack #[derive(Debug)]: PostRow (src/posting.rs:436, public), DeliveryRow (src/delivery.rs:14), SignatureParams (src/inbox.rs:172), CircuitState (src/delivery.rs:41), RemoteAccountRow (src/inbox.rs:62). PostRow is pub and used across modules. Missing Debug makes these types harder to inspect during development and debugging. Fix: add #[derive(Debug)] to all of these types.
